title: Danny's AOT
description: Attack on Titan mod with titan shifting, advanced ODM mechanics and much more
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2vFQzUN5faY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>!

(THIS MOD IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT, EXPECT BUGS)
(Currently NOT Survival friendly. Will come in future update)
(REQUIRES **[GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)** , **[FABRIC API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** & **[AAA Particles 1.4.7]([https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/aaa-particles))**


**(Description)**

This mod is based off the Anime Attack on Titan, it has advanced ODM Gear mechanics, smart pure titan AI, paradis dimension with giant forest, walled villages and much more.

**Click [here](https://trello.com/b/Z6z1Kc1h) for the wiki to learn more about mechanics/features in the mod!**

**(HOW TO USE ODM)**

Equip the ODM gear in your leggings slot and equip a ODM Grip in your off hand and main hand. Press R to load the blades into the grips (Have blade items in your inventory or be in creative)
Use the action keys while looking at a block to grapple (Default G and H, can be changed in binds.
Hold A and D to orbit around target, and SPACE to boost
 

**To enter Paradis Dimension:**

Find a dock structure with a portal to enter paradis.

![Dock Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96a56dbc00b43fa50a3b578bf70640b7bc426906.png)

To exit you must find a return pillar within paradis.

![Return Pillar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57d813671bbc046653e7666b787d1c58a8d23e95.png)

currently /locate is bugged just wander around until you see a path that will lead you to a village/dock structure

In paradis there are walled villages protecting those inside from the Titans.

![Walled Villages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a616ad35d76d433985f80a95451a398342f9695.png)

In said villages are villagers, each village has one villager with a random power. Currently there are only 2 shifters: Attack Titan and Colossal Titan.  Villagers with these powers will have particles around them.

![Villager Powers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/916548aebd45cfb377343972351b5a0036d4d7e1.png)

To obtain the shifter powers from a villager you must hold right click while crouching with a syringe filled with Titan spinal fluid, you may use an empty syringe on a pure titan alive or dead to extract spinal fluid. After injecting yourself you will shift into a pure titan in which you have no control, thus it is recommended to shift near a villager so theres a better chance for it to be eaten. Once eaten you will gain its power.


**Commands to give yourself shifter powers:**

**/daot shifter set @p attack**

**/daot shifter set @p colossal**

Default B to shift, press B again to peak out of your shifters nape, in this mode you may crouch to dismount. **Default binds for shifter abilities are X, C and V**

## **Models by @kronart on Discord!**

**For crafting recipes please use JEI.**

**_You may use this mod in a modpack but please credit me._**
